title: Device V2 backend contract gate addendum
releaseGate: Use if Batch 001 needs a separate backend-focused turn instead of folding contract work into D2LA-001.

stories.title: Backend contract snapshot and test gate for DB-derived acceptance
stories.scope: Produce a Device V2 backend contract snapshot for DB-derived import and store acceptance, run approved backend tests, and make only small Device V2 scoped fixes if concrete contract gaps appear.
stories.nonGoals: Do not change migrations, production config, credential-system implementation, auth, tenant logic, or broad external integrations.
acceptance: Writes `backend-contract-snapshot.md` with routes, DTO fields, import fields, store evidence APIs, error semantics, and useful API example responses.
Runs `go test ./app/device/v2/...` and `go test ./app/device/v2/ingest/...`, or records `environment-blocked` with exact reason.
Any backend fix stays inside Device V2 paths and is tied to a concrete acceptance blocker.
No plaintext credential material appears in evidence.
notes: If tests require unavailable real DB or external collection infrastructure, stop with `environment-blocked`; do not broaden into environment repair in this story.
